violations.text: The following outer openings were observed to be not tight fitting: 1) The door to the outside of the meat cutting room 2) The door to the back loading dock in the back produce prep area Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

The ceiling tiles in the meat cutting area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024

The following outer openings were observed to be not tight fitting: 1) The door to the outside of the meat cutting room 2) The door to the back loading dock in the back produce prep area Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the honeycomb vents in the retail floor coolers and the walk-in fan covers were observed with an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024

Chicken kabob packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels with a list of ingredients. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2023

The door to the outside, located in the meat packing room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2023

Chicken wings that were prepped and packaged on the premises the day before was observed held at 45-48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Person in charge voluntarily disposed of food items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/22/2023
Spray bottles with sanitizer solution were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 06/22/2023

The following outer openings were observed to be not tight fitting: 1) The door to the outside of the meat cutting room 2) The door to the back loading dock Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the fans in the walk-in coolers have an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 06/22/2023
